title: Clause-scoped regex validation prevents elsif shadowing
description: lib.rs validate_stmt: the clause_start tracking resets per Block boundary so that regex pattern validation is scoped to each if/elsif clause independently. This prevents a valid Str in an elsif clause from masking an invalid Str in the preceding if clause (the regression test compile_regex_invalid_in_if_clause_with_elsif covers this). A contributor might simplify to scanning the full flat stmt for the last Str. That would be wrong: it would let invalid patterns in early clauses pass if a valid pattern appeared later. The per-clause scoping is load-bearing and the regression test must stay.
